message:
feat(gui): add structured bootstrap reporting with config resolution validation

- Add --bootstrap-report flag supporting Text and JSON output formats
- Implement ConfigResolutionReport tracking XDG config path discovery:
  searched candidates, resolution strategy (explicit/auto/none), file
  existence validation
- Add BootstrapReport struct with mode, version, config details, cwd,
  vendored checks status, and pending beads
- Validate --cwd and --config-file paths before vendored integration checks
- Add default_config_candidates() searching standard XDG and ~/.config paths
- Helper functions: path_to_string(), os_string_to_utf8(), dedupe_paths()
- Unit tests for config parsing, separator validation, path deduplication
- Reorder imports in mux_client.rs (unconditional before conditionals)

Enables tooling integration via JSON output and provides diagnostic
visibility into config resolution strategy and path search order.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
